prohibited_outputs: do not confirm or rule out a rare disease
do not recommend treatment, dosing, supplements, or procedures
do not recommend a commercial test, product, clinic, or vendor
do not interpret a variant of uncertain significance as diagnostic
allowed_outputs: label information as a discussion lead rather than a diagnosis
recommend consulting a licensed clinician, neuromuscular specialist, or genetic counselor
encourage organizing a symptom timeline and prior test results
required_disclaimers: The sources are MOCK fixtures for a software example.
A licensed clinician must evaluate patient-specific concerns.
